# sakura_simple_notification_routing (Data Source)

Get information about an existing SimpleNotification Routing.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_simple_notification_routing" "foobar" {
  name = "foobar"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the SimpleNotification Routing.
- `name` (String) The name of the SimpleNotification Routing.
- `tags` (Set of String) The tags of the SimpleNotification Routing.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the SimpleNotification Routing.
- `icon_id` (String) The icon id attached to the SimpleNotification Routing
- `match_labels` (Attributes List) The type of the SimpleNotification Routing. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--match_labels))
- `source_id` (String) The value of the SimpleNotification Routing.
- `target_group_id` (String) The value of the SimpleNotification Routing.

<a id="nestedatt--match_labels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `match_labels`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) The key of the match label.
- `value` (String) The value of the match label.
